info.title: Visant Labs Brand Infrastructure API
info.description: Public API exposing 37 MCP tools for AI-powered brand generation, mockups, creative studio, and compliance. Authenticate via API key (`visant_sk_*`) or JWT. MCP tools are available under `/api/mcp/tools/*`. Legacy REST endpoints are also included for compatibility.

post.description: Create a new account with email and password

get.description: Returns LLM-ready formatted brand context. Perfect for AI agents and MCP integrations. No authentication required.

schema.description: Public slug of the brand guideline
Output format: full (default) or compact (optimized for image gen)

post.summary: Improve an image generation prompt
post.description: Refine and enhance a prompt to produce better AI image generation results.

post.summary: Generate an optimized image prompt from structured inputs
post.description: Build a high-quality image generation prompt from design type, style tags, colors, and optional brand context.

post.description: Generate variations of an existing prompt

post.summary: Describe / extract prompt from an image
post.description: Analyze an image and return a detailed description suitable for use as a generation prompt.

post.summary: Extract dominant color palette from an image
post.description: Analyze an image and return hex codes, color names, semantic roles (primary/accent/background/neutral), and frequency.

post.summary: Generate brand or product name suggestions
post.description: Generate creative and memorable name suggestions from a brief. Optionally biased by a brand guideline.

style.description: Naming style (invented word, metaphor, compound, real word)

post.summary: Generate a branding step (persona, archetype, SWOT, colors, moodboard, etc.)
post.description:
Multi-step branding generation engine. Each step generates a specific brand asset using AI.
Step values:
- 1: Market Research — benchmarking paragraph
- 5: Competitors — competitive landscape
- 6: References — visual design inspirations
- 7: SWOT — strengths/weaknesses/opportunities/threats
- 8: Color Palettes — AI color recommendations with hex codes
- 9: Visual Elements — icons, patterns, textures
- 10: Persona — audience persona (demographics, psychographics, pain points)
- 11: Concept Ideas — product mockup and usage scenarios
- 12: Moodboard — mood and aesthetic direction
- 13: Archetypes — brand archetype analysis (Hero, Sage, Lover, Caregiver, etc.)

previousData.description: Prior branding data for context-aware generation (e.g. { marketResearch, swot, colors })

post.summary: Generate multiple mockup images in parallel
post.description: Generate up to 20 mockup images in parallel from an array of prompts. All images share the same model and output settings.

post.summary: Execute plugin command
post.description: Send a command to the Figma plugin for processing

post.summary: Generate a structured creative layout (background prompt, overlay, layers) for a marketing asset.
post.description: Generate a structured creative layout (background prompt, overlay, layers) for a marketing asset. If brandId is provided, the plan is automatically biased by that brand's learned edit history.

brandId.description: Optional brand guideline id for brand-aware generation

brandContext.description: Inline brand context if brandId is not available

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Get learned brand preferences aggregated from user edit history.
post.description: Get learned brand preferences aggregated from user edit history. Returns font-size bias, color overrides, logo position bias, commonly removed roles, and human-readable patches. Use this to understand how a brand's actual usage diverges from AI defaults.

post.summary: Fetch the full brand guideline for a given id.
post.description: Fetch the full brand guideline for a given id. Includes identity, colors, typography, logos, voice, gradients, shadows, motion tokens, borders, strategy, editorial guidelines, and validation state. Use this to get LLM-ready brand context before generating any brand-aware content.

post.description: Patch a brand guideline with new data. Accepts any subset of fields: identity, colors, typography, gradients, shadows, motion, borders, strategy, guidelines, tokens, validation. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

post.summary: Generate a single mockup image using AI (text-to-image or image-to-image).
post.description: Generate a single mockup image using AI (text-to-image or image-to-image). Supports gpt-image-1, gpt-image-2 (OpenAI), seedream, and gemini models. Returns the generated mockup object with imageUrl. For multiple mockups use batch_generate_mockups.

promptText.description: Prompt describing the image to generate

model.description: Model name. For openai: gpt-image-1 or gpt-image-2. For gemini: gemini-2.0-flash-exp-image-generation. For seedream: seedream-3-0.

baseImageUrl.description: URL of a base image for image-to-image generation

brandGuidelineId.description: Brand guideline id to inject brand context into the prompt automatically

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Generate multiple mockup images in parallel.
post.description: Generate multiple mockup images in parallel. prompts can be an array of strings OR an array of objects { promptText, referenceImages?, baseImage? } to pass per-item reference images (e.g. brand logos). All items share the same model, provider, and output settings. Max 20 per call.

referenceImages.description: Per-prompt reference images (e.g. brand logo URLs)

prompts.description: Array of prompts (string) or prompt objects with per-item referenceImages (max 20)

model.description: Model name. For openai: gpt-image-1 or gpt-image-2. For gemini: gemini-2.0-flash-exp-image-generation.

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio for all images. Default: 1:1

resolution.description: Output resolution for all images. Default: 1K

brandGuidelineId.description: Brand guideline id to inject brand context into all prompts automatically

baseImageUrl.description: Optional base image URL applied to all generations (image-to-image)

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Generate a full ad campaign from a product image and brand guidelines.
post.description: Generate a full ad campaign from a product image and brand guidelines. An LLM (GPT-4o) plans N distinct prompts across creative angles (benefit, social proof, urgency, lifestyle, fear, transformation, etc.) then generates all images in parallel using GPT-image-1 or Gemini. Returns a jobId for polling. Use get_campaign_results to check progress.

productImageUrl.description: URL of the product photo to use as base image

brandGuidelineId.description: Brand guideline id for brand-aware generation

brief.description: Creative brief describing the campaign goal

formats.description: Ad formats to generate. Cycles through formats if count > formats.length

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Poll the status and results of an ad campaign generation job started by create_ad_campaign.
post.description: Poll the status and results of an ad campaign generation job started by create_ad_campaign. Returns status (planning|generating|done|error), progress count, and per-ad results with imageUrl, prompt, adAngle, and format.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Get a structured LLM-ready design system context for a brand.
post.description: Get a structured LLM-ready design system context for a brand. Returns colors with semantic roles, typography with intent, spacing/radius tokens, shadows, gradients, motion tokens, and borders — formatted as a concise JSON optimized for AI code generation and design decisions.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Extract content from a local PDF file using a 2-phase pipeline: algorithmic (exact colors, fonts, embedded images) then Gemini semantic analysis (strategy, personas, voice, dos/donts, asset classification).
post.description: Extract content from a local PDF file using a 2-phase pipeline: algorithmic (exact colors, fonts, embedded images) then Gemini semantic analysis (strategy, personas, voice, dos/donts, asset classification). Returns markdownText (structured, page-separated — ideal for RAG chunking) plus brand tokens. IMPORTANT: before calling, ask the user: "Quer salvar o .md em disco ou receber o texto inline?"

pdf_path.description: Absolute path to the local PDF file to extract.

output.description: "disk" saves .md alongside the PDF. "inline" returns markdownText in the response.

include_brand_tokens.description: Include colors, typography, strategy, assetClassifications. Default: true.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

apiKeyAuth.description: API key for agent/developer access. Format: visant_sk_xxxxxxxxxxxx. Get yours from Settings → API Keys.
